name: @intelehealth/webrtc
description: A reusable React WebRTC video call component for local development and multi-project consumption.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --out-dir dist --external react --external react-dom --clean
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --out-dir dist --external react --external react-dom --watch
